executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned checks stay localized and pass, but the live stack is still red because docs and marketing owner loops are failing their own independent verifier contracts.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Clear the docs verifier/editorial contradiction and let the marketing repair window reach a fresh independent pass before any global green claim.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus jobs.json comparison with explicit live-vs-persisted separation

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Docs and marketing remain the live blocker domains
findings.mechanism: Docs verifier is still red and marketing independent verification still returns fail with unresolved primary-repo adoption / needs_repair blockers.
findings.root_cause: Docs still has editorial-versus-agentic contradiction, while marketing is still fail-closed on flat primary-repo adoption and unresolved repair-state evidence.
findings.recommended_fix: Repair docs inside the docs owner loop and clear the marketing repair window with a fresh independent pass before recertifying the stack.

findings.title: Architecture watchdog remains localized and internally healthy
findings.mechanism: loop_integrity_latest.json still marks agent-architecture-watchdog ok and the current live topology stays clean.
findings.root_cause: Architecture ownership boundaries are holding; the remaining blockers are external owner-loop failures rather than architecture drift.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep fail-closed freshness gating and preserve owner-domain localization.

findings.title: Live scheduler topology is clean; only persisted disabled history remains
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron state shows 20 enabled jobs, 0 live disabled, 0 running, and 0 error; jobs.json still carries 4 disabled historical entries.
findings.root_cause: No live scheduler drift is visible; the only stale risk is reporting persisted history as live state.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get the docs owner loop back to independent pass
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Docs is still red on verifier contract and stability.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Removes the docs blocker domain from live health state.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Clear the marketing repair window with a fresh independent pass
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing is still fail-closed on primary-repo adoption and needs_repair evidence.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Removes the second live blocker domain.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun architecture signoff after either owner loop materially changes state
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Architecture movement now depends on fresh owner-loop evidence, not new architecture repairs.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Keeps signoff aligned with live owner-loop state.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Rewrote the architecture audit with direct live cron topology, current persisted-disabled history, and current docs/marketing blocker localization.
Direct live check confirms 20 jobs, 20 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 error.

independent_verification.summary: Pending rerun after this audit artifact refresh.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh docs independent pass after the docs loop clears the editorial/verifier contradiction.
Fresh marketing independent pass after the marketing repair window clears and primary-repo movement evidence changes.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Two owner loops are still red at the same time
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Docs is still failing its independent verifier while marketing is still fail-closed on primary-repo adoption and needs_repair, so the full stack is not globally green.

notes: Architecture green here means architecture-owned verification is localized and healthy; it does not mean the full product stack is globally healthy.
Persisted disabled jobs are history only; they are not live disabled runtime jobs.
Current persisted disabled history count is 4 because jobs.json still includes stackoverflow-post-cooldown-run-check in addition to the prior disabled entries.
